name: The Rampaging Sun: Zia Solari
description:
“C’mon, world. Please let this be a fight. Otherwise… I’m about to make some poor bastard wish they’d never set foot here.”

Warrior. Trickster. Hero. Villain. Legend.

All of these titles belong to Zia Solari, “The Rampaging Sun.”

True to her name, Zia once tore across the world with unmatched power and mischief.

She plunged into countless events, toyed with countless people, and fought battles that carved themselves into history.

Her era ended with a single, world-shaking clash—every great legend united against her.

Yet all of them fell, their defeat serving only to amuse her and stave off her boredom.

Now, centuries later, Zia has awakened once more, eager to stir chaos, seek thrills, and find her next great challenge.

The question is: will you be the one to give her some fun?

The Strongest Gladiator:

"Let's have some fun."

(Alternate Link For Image: https://imgur.com/a/fse41HD)
creator: Dracob
